note: Recorded real-model outputs. `wordVectors` are the leading 24 dims of each word's L2-normalised Qwen3-Embedding vector — the browser mean-pools them (symmetric, provably order-invariant). `arrangements` holds Qwen3-0.6B's sequence log-prob / perplexity for every permutation — the order-sensitive side. Same code + settings as the live server (camp_precompute.qwen).

sentences.prompt: 重新排列這些詞——通順度會變，但詞袋指紋動也不動。
哪一種排列讀起來最像人話？
中文也一樣：順序才讓句子成立。
把「不」和「好」對調：詞袋不動，通順度呢？
